label: NumberInput: destructure onBlur/onKeyDown for composition
old:
className,
      disabled: disabledProp,
      readOnly,
      id: idProp,
      'aria-describedby': ariaDescribedByProp,
new:
className,
      disabled: disabledProp,
      readOnly,
      id: idProp,
      onBlur: onBlurProp,
      onKeyDown: onKeyDownProp,
      'aria-describedby': ariaDescribedByProp,

label: NumberInput: draft state declaration (before non-edit early return, Rules-of-Hooks)
old:
// 2026-06-08 SSOT:mode 經 useResolvedFieldMode 統一解析(prop > 有效 disabled > fieldCtx.mode > readOnly > 'edit')
    const resolvedMode: FieldMode = useResolvedFieldMode({ mode: modeProp, disabled, readOnly })

label: NumberInput: handleChange writes draft first
NumberInput: input binds draft-first display + blur/Enter/Escape commit
LinkInput: import useResolvedFieldInvalid
old: import { useFieldContext, useResolvedFieldSize, useResolvedFieldDisabled, useResolvedFieldMode, useResolvedFieldVariant } from '@/design-system/components/Field/field-context'
new: import { useFieldContext, useResolvedFieldSize, useResolvedFieldDisabled, useResolvedFieldMode, useResolvedFieldVariant, useResolvedFieldInvalid } from '@/design-system/components/Field/field-context'

label: LinkInput: resolve fieldInvalid via SSOT resolver (before display early return)
old:
// chrome resolution:per-prop > context > 'default'
    const resolvedVariant: FieldVariant = useResolvedFieldVariant(variantProp)

label: LinkInput: aria-invalid same source as visual
LinkInput: aria-errormessage same source as visual
LinkInput: showLink branch wrapper也接 error 紅框
old: {value && renderLinkAnchor(value, label)}
new: 下 link state 完全無 error 呈現 className={cn(fieldWrapperStyles({ mode: 'edit', variant: resolvedVariant, size, error }), className)} data-field-mode="edit" data-error={error ? '' : undefined} > {value && renderLinkAnchor(value, label)}

label: useFormValidation: docblock 補 double-submit 防護一行
old: * + Submit button:Create 永遠 enabled / Update disabled-until-dirty → `submitDisabled`
new:
* + Submit button:Create 永遠 enabled / Update disabled-until-dirty → `submitDisabled`
 * + Double-submit 防護(2026-07-05 D4):await onSubmit 期間重入直接忽略;`isSubmitting`
 *   暴露餵 Button loading / disabled;onSubmit reject 先復位再原樣上拋(不吞錯)

label: useFormValidation: return interface 加 isSubmitting
old:
/** Submit button disabled 狀態(intent 驅動,見 options.intent) */
  submitDisabled: boolean

label: useFormValidation: isSubmitting ref+state + entry guard
useFormValidation: onSubmit try/finally 復位 + rejection 原樣上拋
useFormValidation: return 面 submitDisabled 併 isSubmitting + 暴露 isSubmitting
